item.title: 随着特朗普将芯片推向国内，Netlist 的 ITC 内存竞购可能会让三星、英伟达留在海外
item.summary: A US trade agency has opened an investigation that could block imports of the DDR5 server memory and high-bandwidth memory (HBM) feeding the AI data center boom, handing a small California patent holder a border lever that runs parallel to President Donald Trump's campaign to force chip production back onto US soil.
